title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, August 12 2025
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Values for mid-age Supramaxes have firmed slightly this week owing to secondhand sales. Capesize BC Herun Zhejiang (181,100 DWT, Jul 2017, Shanghai Waigaoqiao Shipbuilding) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 48 mil, VV Value USD 47.47 mil
Kamsarmax BC Star Danai (82,600 DWT, Oct 2007, Tadotsu Tsuneishi) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 11.44 mil, VV Value USD 11.45 mil
Supramax BC Cheval Blanc (57,000 DWT, Sep 2009, Jiangsu Hantong Ship Heavy Industry) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 10.5 mil, VV Value USD 10.22 mil
Tankers: Tanker values remained mostly stable as second-hand tanker sales slowed sharply, reflecting seasonal lulls and owners opting to trade rather than sell
VLCC Halcyon (299,900 DWT, Nov 2020, Hyundai Samho HI) sold to Seaways Shipping for USD 119 mil, VV Value USD 116.8 mil
Containers: Values hold steady with minimal S&P activity in the last week. Handy Atlantic West & Atlantic Silver (1,347 TEU, 2008, Jiangsu Yangzijiang) sold in an en bloc deal to CMA CGM for USD 34 mil, VV Value USD 31.15 mil
Image reference: assets/2025-08-12_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-august-12-2025_img1_128202527_39004805cb06.jpg
